metadata.duration_policy: Fixed request count per scenario; concurrency breakdown uses bounded parallel jobs. Heavy AI endpoints are measured only when -IncludeHeavyConcurrency is set.
metadata.warmup_policy: Cold run clears benchmark caches unless -SkipCacheClear is set; warm run reuses available cache state.

daysPlan.note: Used only for route-suggestions stress testing.
